allow: Bash(sqlite3 data/fenix.sqlite "SELECT id, username, role FROM users LIMIT 5;")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('./data/fenix.sqlite',{readonly:true}\);console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT id,username,role FROM users LIMIT 5'\).all\(\)\);")
Bash(sqlite3 data/fenix.sqlite "SELECT id, name, email, role_id FROM users LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/fenix.sqlite "SELECT id, username, name, role_id FROM users LIMIT 5; SELECT * FROM roles;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/fenix.sqlite "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM sales; SELECT id,status,paid_at,created_at,total FROM sales LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/fenix.sqlite "SELECT id,user_id,paid_by,status FROM sales LIMIT 7;")

PowerShell(sqlite3 "C:\\Users\\DJMER\\Desktop\\fenix sqlite\\fenix\\apps\\backend\\data\\fenix.sqlite" "DELETE FROM settings WHERE key LIKE 'email_stock_alert_state_%'; SELECT changes\(\) AS eliminados;")
Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT id, user_id, status, total, datetime\(created_at\) AS created, datetime\(paid_at\) AS paid FROM sales ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT 'NOW UTC:', datetime\('now'\); SELECT 'NOW LOCAL:', datetime\('now','localtime'\); SELECT 'TZ OFFSET:', strftime\('%H:%M', 'now', 'localtime'\) || ' vs ' || strftime\('%H:%M','now'\); SELECT 'Total sales:', COUNT\(*\) FROM sales; SELECT 'Open sales:', COUNT\(*\) FROM sales WHERE status='open'; SELECT 'Paid sales:', COUNT\(*\) FROM sales WHERE status='paid';")
Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT id, status, datetime\(created_at\) AS created, datetime\(paid_at\) AS paid, total FROM sales ORDER BY rowid DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT 'monthly_number col exists:', COUNT\(*\) FROM pragma_table_info\('sales'\) WHERE name='monthly_number';")
Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT key, length\(value\) AS valLen FROM settings WHERE key LIKE 'email%' OR key LIKE 'smtp%' OR key LIKE '%alert%';")
Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT id, status, datetime\(created_at\) AS created, datetime\(paid_at\) AS paid, total FROM sales ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 15;")

Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT 'Today paid count:', COUNT\(*\) FROM sales WHERE status='paid' AND date\(COALESCE\(paid_at,created_at\)\) = date\('now','localtime'\); SELECT 'Today open count:', COUNT\(*\) FROM sales WHERE status='open' AND date\(created_at\) = date\('now','localtime'\);")

Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT datetime\('now'\) AS utc_now, datetime\('now','localtime'\) AS local_now, date\('now','localtime'\) AS local_date; SELECT '---'; SELECT id, created_at, paid_at, status, date\(created_at\) AS created_date, date\(paid_at\) AS paid_date, date\(COALESCE\(paid_at,created_at\)\) AS filter_date FROM sales ORDER BY id;")

Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT '=== Test localtime modifier ==='; SELECT id, created_at AS stored, date\(created_at\) AS plain_date, date\(created_at,'localtime'\) AS local_date FROM sales ORDER BY id;")

Bash(sqlite3 fenix.sqlite "SELECT '=== Si usamos localtime ==='; SELECT date\(created_at,'localtime'\) as d, COUNT\(*\) FROM sales WHERE status='paid' GROUP BY date\(created_at,'localtime'\); SELECT '--- TODAY filter test ---'; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS today_paid FROM sales WHERE status='paid' AND date\(COALESCE\(paid_at,created_at\),'localtime'\) = date\('now','localtime'\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new Database\('./data/fenix.sqlite',{readonly:true}\); console.log\('USERS:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('SELECT id,username,name,role_id,is_active,length\(password\) as pwlen, substr\(password,1,7\) as pwprefix FROM users'\).all\(\),null,2\)\); console.log\('ROLES:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM roles'\).all\(\),null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new Database\('C:/Users/DJMER/AppData/Roaming/pos-tablet/fenix.sqlite',{readonly:true}\); console.log\('USERS:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('SELECT id,username,name,role_id,is_active,length\(password\) as pwlen, substr\(password,1,7\) as pwprefix FROM users'\).all\(\),null,2\)\); db.close\(\);")
PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'node','npm','ollama','opencode'\) { $cmd = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "$c -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "$c -> NO INSTALADO" } })

PowerShell("=== GPU ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name, @{N='VRAM_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.AdapterRAM/1GB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; "=== RAM total ==="; "{0} GB" -f [math]::Round\(\(Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem\).TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB,1\))
Bash(node -e "const c=require\('C:/Users/DJMER/.config/opencode/opencode.json'\); console.log\('JSON OK | model:', c.model, '| agent model:', c.agent.ollama_local_build.model\)")
PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice -Class USB | Where-Object { $_.Status -ne 'OK' } | Select-Object Status, FriendlyName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content pos.css -Raw\) -replace '1\\.5px solid', '1px solid' -replace '2px solid var\\\(--border-strong\\\)', '1.5px solid var\(--border-strong\)' -replace '1\\.5px dashed', '1px dashed' | Set-Content pos.css -NoNewline")
